title: Las Pruebas de Heracles

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Heracles, a man of massive, scarred musculature and wild, matted beard, follows a single, glowing golden thread through the pitch-black labyrinth of the underworld.
panels.en: The thread leads him out of the darkness, but the path to redemption is long.

facil.es: El hilo brilla. Hay un largo camino.

intermedio.es: El hilo guía a Heracles. El camino es largo y difícil.

nativo.es: El hilo destella en la penumbra. El sendero hacia la redención apenas comienza.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Heracles, a man of massive, scarred musculature and wild, matted beard, stands before the Oracle at Delphi, who holds up one finger.
panels.en: One life was taken, so one debt must be paid through many trials.

facil.es: Una vida terminó. Ahora, una deuda espera.

intermedio.es: Una sola vida se perdió; ahora debes pagar una gran deuda.

nativo.es: Por una vida arrebatada, una sola expiación es requerida.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Heracles, a man of massive, scarred musculature and wild, matted beard, stares at a stone tablet listing twelve distinct, brutal tasks.
panels.en: The gods demand exactly twelve labors to wash away his sins.

facil.es: Doce trabajos son necesarios para el héroe.

intermedio.es: Los dioses exigen doce pruebas para borrar sus pecados.

nativo.es: Doce tareas ineludibles pesan sobre sus hombros como penitencia.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Heracles, a man of massive, scarred musculature and wild, matted beard, stands in the Nemean forest, eyes fixed on a single, massive, golden-maned lion in the shadows.
panels.en: The first labor: a single, invulnerable beast that terrorizes the valley.

facil.es: El primer trabajo comienza. Hay un león muy grande.

intermedio.es: La primera prueba: un solo león invulnerable acecha el valle.

nativo.es: La primera labor: abatir a la bestia única e invulnerable de Nemea.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Heracles, a man of massive, scarred musculature and wild, matted beard, raises his wooden club against the lion, but the weapon shatters upon impact.
panels.en: His club breaks into pieces, for no ordinary weapon can pierce its hide.

facil.es: Su palo se rompe en muchos pedazos.

intermedio.es: El arma se quiebra en varios fragmentos contra la piel del león.

nativo.es: Su garrote se hace añicos; ninguna arma forjada por manos mortales lo hiere.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Heracles, a muscular man with a thick beard and lion-skin cloak, realizes his sword is useless as it lies in two pieces on the ground. The massive Nemean lion snarls in the shadows.
panels.en: Heracles drops his broken sword. He has zero weapons left.

facil.es: Heracles tira la espada rota. Tiene cero armas ahora.

intermedio.es: Heracles suelta su espada partida. Ya no le quedan armas.

nativo.es: Heracles arroja el acero roto. Carece de cualquier arma para el combate.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Heracles charges at the lion, his massive arms ready to grapple.
panels.en: He runs with his two powerful arms wide open.

facil.es: Él corre con sus dos brazos fuertes.

intermedio.es: Corre hacia la bestia con sus dos brazos abiertos.

nativo.es: Se lanza al frente, extendiendo sus dos brazos como grilletes.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Close-up of the struggle: Heracles' hands grabbing the lion's throat. The lion's claws rake his back.
panels.en: Ten claws cut his back, but he does not let go.

facil.es: Diez garras cortan su espalda, pero él no suelta al león.

intermedio.es: Diez garras afiladas hieren su espalda, mas él resiste.

nativo.es: Diez zarpazos laceran su espalda, mas su agarre es inamovible.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Heracles is straining every muscle, his face contorted in effort, choking the lion.
panels.en: He uses all his strength. One goal: victory.

facil.es: Usa toda su fuerza. Tiene una meta: la victoria.

intermedio.es: Emplea toda su energía vital. Solo busca una cosa: la victoria.

nativo.es: Concentra toda su potencia en un solo objetivo: alcanzar la victoria.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. The lion begins to weaken, its eyes closing as Heracles maintains his hold.
panels.en: The beast has four legs, but zero breath remains.

facil.es: La bestia tiene cuatro patas, pero ya no tiene aire.

intermedio.es: La bestia se tambalea sobre sus cuatro patas, sin aliento.

nativo.es: Pese a sus cuatro patas, la bestia sucumbe, privada de todo aliento.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Heracles, a muscular man with a thick beard and lion-skin cloak, stands over the fallen Nemean Lion, his hands gripping its massive jaws.
panels.en: He holds the jaws with both hands.

facil.es: Heracles usa sus dos manos. Abre las fauces del león.

intermedio.es: Con sus dos manos fuertes, Heracles abre las fauces de la bestia.

nativo.es: El héroe inmoviliza a la fiera; sus dos manos se cierran como tenazas sobre las fauces invulnerables.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Heracles, a muscular man with a thick beard and lion-skin cloak, exerts immense pressure as the lion struggles one last time.
panels.en: The beast has a thousand sharp teeth.

facil.es: El león tiene mil dientes afilados.

intermedio.es: La bestia muestra mil dientes afilados, pero Heracles no tiene miedo.

nativo.es: Brillan mil colmillos en la oscuridad, un arma inútil ante la fuerza bruta del semidiós.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Heracles, a muscular man with a thick beard and lion-skin cloak, watches as the lion finally goes limp.
panels.en: The first labor is almost finished.

facil.es: Es el primer trabajo. Casi termina.

intermedio.es: El primer trabajo está llegando a su final.

nativo.es: El primero de los doce trabajos toca a su fin con la rendición del monstruo.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Heracles, a muscular man with a thick beard and lion-skin cloak, stands up, breathing heavily, looking at the distant horizon.
panels.en: He counts many scars on his arms.

facil.es: Heracles ve muchas cicatrices en sus brazos.

intermedio.es: Él cuenta muchas cicatrices nuevas en sus brazos cansados.

nativo.es: Observa sus brazos, marcados por muchas heridas que apenas comienzan a sangrar.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Heracles, a muscular man with a thick beard and lion-skin cloak, begins to skin the lion using its own claw.
panels.en: Only a few drops of blood fall.

facil.es: Solo caen unas pocas gotas de sangre.

intermedio.es: Caen solo unas pocas gotas de sangre sobre la tierra seca.

nativo.es: Unas pocas gotas de sangre carmesí tiñen el suelo, el tributo final de la fiera.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Heracles, a man of massive, corded musculature and tangled dark beard, stands over the limp, golden-furred body of the Nemean Lion. He wipes his brow with a bloodied hand.
panels.en: One lion lies dead. The first test is over.

facil.es: Un león está muerto. Es el primer trabajo.

intermedio.es: El león yace muerto. El primer trabajo ha terminado.

nativo.es: La bestia yace inerte. El primero de los doce trabajos ha llegado a su fin.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Heracles, a man of massive, corded musculature and tangled dark beard, struggles to skin the beast with its own razor-sharp claw.
panels.en: He uses one claw to cut the skin.

facil.es: Usa una garra para cortar la piel.

intermedio.es: Utiliza una de las garras para rasgar la piel dura.

nativo.es: Emplea una sola garra, afilada como el acero, para desollar la piel invulnerable.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Heracles, a man of massive, corded musculature and tangled dark beard, stands tall draped in the lion skin, looking toward the distant horizon.
panels.en: Eleven tasks remain for him.

facil.es: Quedan once trabajos más.

intermedio.es: Ahora le faltan once tareas para ser libre.

nativo.es: Aún restan once pruebas titánicas en su penoso camino hacia la redención.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Heracles, a man of massive, corded musculature and tangled dark beard, turns his back, his shadow stretching long against the mountain path.
panels.en: The path ahead is dark and long.

facil.es: El camino es muy largo.

intermedio.es: El camino frente a él es oscuro y largo.

nativo.es: Un sendero sombrío y tortuoso se extiende ante sus pies cansados.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Heracles, a man of massive, corded musculature and tangled dark beard, sees a monstrous, multi-headed shadow rising from a swamp in the distance.
panels.en: But wait—the swamp bubbles with something new.

facil.es: Pero el pantano tiene algo nuevo.

intermedio.es: Sin embargo, algo surge desde el pantano profundo.

nativo.es: Mas desde el fétido pantano, una amenaza de múltiples cabezas comienza a emerger.

cliffhanger: El león era solo el principio; ahora, el pantano de Lerna oculta una hidra con más cabezas de las que un hombre puede contar.
closingBeat: La expiación nunca es un camino recto, sino un ciclo de dolor que se multiplica.
